gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor motions with both arms wide open, smiling and inviting the class to notice the colorful objects on the screen
a tutor tilts their head slightly, leans forward, and points with one finger toward the two groups, encouraging the learners to observe
a tutor moves closer to the screen, gestures with both hands as if bringing the groups together, and smiles while explaining
a person raises both hands and waves them in a counting motion, inviting everyone to join in as they count the objects
a tutor steps back, spreads arms and invites the class to participate, encouraging them to count and combine the groups
a person points toward the imaginary combined group in the air, leaning slightly forward while asking about the total count
a tutor claps hands together, smiles brightly, and nods enthusiastically while celebrating the learners' success in combining groups
a tutor raises a finger to emphasize, then moves hands outward as if spreading knowledge, reminding everyone about the importance of addition
